TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_Talamakau, title = Talamakau, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/Talamakau} }

S.FORM: Talamakau i Pingtung a kuwan nu Kalinku ku niyazu' nu Talamakau. u kasalumaluma' nu Talamakau sa, 229 ku luma'. kumud nu kasabinawlan sa, 757 ku tademawan. kasabinawlan nu Ingcumin sa, 718 ku tademaw, pakalatu 95%. u zuma sa, cay ku Ingcumin, 39 ku tademaw, pakalatu 5%. u kasabinacadan, Rukai 85%, Paiwan 5%, Bunun 1%, Amis 2%, zumazuma 2%.
S.PHON: tar~ɾamakau i piŋtuŋ a kuwan nu kar~ɾinku ku nijazuʔ~ʡ nu tar~ɾamakau. u kasar~ɾumar~ɾumaʔ~ʡ nu tar~ɾamakau sa, *** ku r~ɾumaʔ~ʡ. kumud nu kasabinawr~ɾan sa, *** ku tadəmawan. kasabinawr~ɾan nu iŋʦumin sa, *** ku tadəmaw, pakar~ɾatu **%. u zuma sa, ʦaj ku iŋʦumin, ** ku tadəmaw, pakar~ɾatu *%. u kasabinaʦadan, *ukai **%, paiwan *%, bunun *%, amis *%, zumazuma *%.
S.FORM: Talamakau i Pingtung a kuwan nu Kalinku ku niyazu' nu Talamakau. u kasalumaluma' nu Talamakau sa, 229 ku luma'. kumud nu kasabinawlan sa, 757 ku tademawan. kasabinawlan nu Ingcumin sa, 718 ku tademaw, pakalatu 95%. u zuma sa, cay ku Ingcumin, 39 ku tademaw, pakalatu 5%. u kasabinacadan, Rukai 85%, Paiwan 5%, Bunun 1%, Amis 2%, zumazuma 2%.
S.PHON: tar~ɾamakau i piŋtuŋ a kuwan nu kar~ɾinku ku nijazuʔ~ʡ nu tar~ɾamakau. u kasar~ɾumar~ɾumaʔ~ʡ nu tar~ɾamakau sa, *** ku r~ɾumaʔ~ʡ. kumud nu kasabinawr~ɾan sa, *** ku tadəmawan. kasabinawr~ɾan nu iŋʦumin sa, *** ku tadəmaw, pakar~ɾatu **%. u zuma sa, ʦaj ku iŋʦumin, ** ku tadəmaw, pakar~ɾatu *%. u kasabinaʦadan, *ukai **%, paiwan *%, bunun *%, amis *%, zumazuma *%.
